metadata.name: Iowa Business Search
metadata.description: Search Iowa Secretary of State business entity database by name and extract paginated results

variables.name: correlationId
variables.description: Trace correlation ID from calling client

variables.name: searchEntryUrl
variables.description: Iowa SOS business search page URL

variables.name: maxPages
variables.description: Maximum number of result pages to scrape

variables.name: results
variables.description: Accumulated search results across all pages

actions.description: Load Iowa SOS business search page
Wait for search form to render
Enter business name into search field
Wait for submit button to be present in DOM (reCAPTCHA may delay render)
Extract search results from results table. Columns: Business No. (link), Name, Status, Type, Legal Name
actions.javascript: () => { const normalize = (v) => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const tables = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('table')); const target = tables.find(t => { const headers = Array.from(t.querySelectorAll('th')).map(th => normalize(th.textContent)); return headers.includes('Business No.') && headers.includes('Name') && headers.includes('Status'); }); if (!target) return JSON.stringify([]); const headerRow = Array.from(target.querySelectorAll('tr')).find(r => r.querySelectorAll('th').length >= 4); if (!headerRow) return JSON.stringify([]); const paginationRow = target.querySelector('tr:last-child'); const rows = Array.from(target.querySelectorAll('tr')).filter(r => { const cells = r.querySelectorAll('td'); return cells.length >= 4 && r !== paginationRow; }); return JSON.stringify(rows.filter(row => { const firstCell = row.querySelector('td'); return firstCell && firstCell.querySelector('a'); }).map(row => { const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('td')); const link = cells[0]?.querySelector('a'); const href = link?.getAttribute('href') || ''; const detailsUrl = href ? new URL(href, window.location.href).toString() : ''; return { identifier: normalize(cells[0]?.textContent), name: normalize(cells[1]?.textContent), status: normalize(cells[2]?.textContent), entityType: normalize(cells[3]?.textContent), legalName: cells.length >= 5 ? normalize(cells[4]?.textContent) : null, state: 'IA', detailsUrl: detailsUrl, formationDate: null, searchResultType: normalize(cells[3]?.textContent) === 'Fictitious name' ? 'fictitious-name' : 'legal-name' }; })); }

() => { const text = document.body.innerText || ''; const match = text.match(/Results\s+(\d+)\s*-\s*(\d+)\s+of\s+(\d+)/i); return match ? JSON.stringify({ start: parseInt(match[1]), end: parseInt(match[2]), siteTotalCount: parseInt(match[3]), currentPage: Math.ceil(parseInt(match[1]) / 25), totalPages: Math.ceil(parseInt(match[3]) / 25) }) : JSON.stringify({ siteTotalCount: 0, currentPage: 1, totalPages: 1 }); }

actions.description: Paginate through remaining result pages via numbered page links
Determine next page number and find its link
actions.javascript: () => { const cells = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('table td')); const paginationCell = cells.find(c => { const links = c.querySelectorAll('a[href*="results.aspx"]'); return links.length > 0; }); if (!paginationCell) return JSON.stringify(null); const textNodes = paginationCell.childNodes; let currentPage = null; for (const node of textNodes) { if (node.nodeType === 3) { const num = node.textContent.trim().match(/^(\d+)$/); if (num) { currentPage = parseInt(num[1]); break; } } } if (!currentPage) return JSON.stringify(null); const nextNum = currentPage + 1; const links = paginationCell.querySelectorAll('a[href*="results.aspx"]'); for (const link of links) { if (link.textContent.trim() === String(nextNum)) { return JSON.stringify({ nextPage: nextNum, href: link.getAttribute('href') }); } } return JSON.stringify(null); }

() => { const normalize = (v) => (v || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const tables = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('table')); const target = tables.find(t => { const headers = Array.from(t.querySelectorAll('th')).map(th => normalize(th.textContent)); return headers.includes('Business No.') && headers.includes('Name') && headers.includes('Status'); }); if (!target) return JSON.stringify([]); const rows = Array.from(target.querySelectorAll('tr')).filter(r => { const cells = r.querySelectorAll('td'); const firstCell = r.querySelector('td'); return cells.length >= 4 && firstCell && firstCell.querySelector('a'); }); return JSON.stringify(rows.map(row => { const cells = Array.from(row.querySelectorAll('td')); const link = cells[0]?.querySelector('a'); const href = link?.getAttribute('href') || ''; const detailsUrl = href ? new URL(href, window.location.href).toString() : ''; return { identifier: normalize(cells[0]?.textContent), name: normalize(cells[1]?.textContent), status: normalize(cells[2]?.textContent), entityType: normalize(cells[3]?.textContent), legalName: cells.length >= 5 ? normalize(cells[4]?.textContent) : null, state: 'IA', detailsUrl: detailsUrl, formationDate: null, searchResultType: normalize(cells[3]?.textContent) === 'Fictitious name' ? 'fictitious-name' : 'legal-name' }; })); }
